description.value:
Feudal World

Feudal worlds are locked in a state of technological stagnation where muscle, oath, and lineage matter more than machinery. Their people are raised within rigid hierarchies of service and obligation, learning from birth to endure hardship in armour and answer the calls of lord, faith, and Emperor alike. When drawn into the Inquisition's service, they carry that same discipline into darker wars against the enemies within.

Homeworld Bonus

+Perception, +Weapon Skill, -Intelligence

Homeworld Aptitude

Weapon Skill

Wounds

9+1d5

Fate Threshold

3 (Emperor's Blessing 6+)

Homeworld Trait

At Home in Armour: A feudal world character ignores the maximum Agility value imposed by any armour he is wearing.

specialAbilities.name: At Home in Armour
specialAbilities.description: A feudal world character ignores the maximum Agility value imposed by any armour he is wearing.

system.notes: Emperor's Blessing: On a roll of 6+ on 1d10, the character begins with an extra Fate Point.
